name: Copenhagen Sparkling Tea BLA
description: Sparkling Tea BLÅ starts out with delicate aromas of Jasmine, chamomile and a hint of citrus. This is followed by a round taste from the careful selection of white teas and accompanied by good complexity and depth from the green teas. It ends in a long finish joined by comfortable tannins created by the Darjeeling First Flush. The color is light green with yellow nuances.
extras: {"ingredients":"Water, black tea* (14% Jasmin*, 3% Darjeeling*), 19% white tea*, green tea* and herbal tea leaves*, grape juice*, lemon juice”, natural aromas*, CO2 and citric acid and lactic acid. *Organic.","carbohydrates":"5g","fat":"0g","protein":"0g","sodium":"0g"}

name: Kolonne Null Cuvée No. 01 Sparkling Non-Alcoholic Wine
description: We present our sparkling fresh Cuvée Blanc No.1 - A harmonious combination of yellow fruit of pear and mirabelle, rounded off with a touch of typical brioche notes. The elegant acidity is balanced by a creamy, fine bubbly texture.

name: Copenhagen Sparkling Tea LYSEGRØN
description: LYSEGRØN is based on a careful selection of 12 different organic teas, which are brewed at different temperatures and time intervals. The blend is combined in one bottle, together with a small base of grape must and a dash of lemon juice.
extras: {"ingredients":"Water, 44% green tea – * ((8% Sencha*) (added citrus)), white teas-*, herbal tea leaves*, grape juice*, lemon juice*, natural aromas*, CO2, Citric Acid and Lactic Acid. *Organic.","carbohydrates":"4g","fat":"0g","protein":"0g","sodium":"0g"}

name: Lussory Organic Merlot Non-Alcoholic Red Wine
description: This alcohol-free red wine (dealcoholized) is organic and made 100% from Merlot grapes. Deep ruby blue color, notes of blackberry, plum, and raspberry. Medium-plus to full body. Red wine with purple floral notes towards the top of the glass. Pyrazines, or green notes, come across as leafy rather than peppery. Rich baking spices from oak aging.

name: Copenhagen Sparkling Tea LYSEROD
description: The perfect alcohol-free alternative to a rosé. LYSERØD is the driest version of Sparkling Tea, yet still smooth and round in taste. You will experience intense aromas of red berries and red apples. A complex and comfortably dry taste follows, thanks to the Oolong tea, combined with hints of blackberries and hibiscus. It’s all balanced by the smooth Silver Needle white tea and finished with light bitter fruity notes. The color is a light pink rosé.
extras: {"ingredients":"Water, gren tea* (23% Oolong*). herbal* (22% Hibiscus*), white tea* (16% Silver Needle) and black tea leaves*, grape juice*, lemon juice*, natural aromas*, CO2 and citric acid and lactic acid. *Organic.","carbohydrates":"2g","fat":"0g","protein":"0g","sodium":"0g"}

name: So Jennie Paris Blanc French Champagne Alternative 0.0% 750ml
description: So Jennie Paris Blanc is a luxury alcohol-free sparkling cuvée crafted in France to deliver a refined Champagne-style experience without alcohol. Presented in an elegant, beautifully designed bottle that mirrors the sophistication of premium Champagne service, it offers both visual impact and exceptional quality for high-end hospitality environments.
